_comment: Provider-aware TradingView -> broker symbol map. Copy to config/symbols.json (or set SYMBOLS_MAP_PATH) to enable. Each top-level key is the TradingView ticker. Each value is a map keyed by broker provider. Missing entries fall back to the TradingView ticker.
_warning: The 'tradovate' values below are placeholders. Real contract codes roll over and must be edited per quarter — do not assume the months shown here are current.
